flags.name: sale_banner
flags.description: Show the gold promo bar at top of catalog

flags.description: Enable Apple Pay / Google Pay buttons in checkout

flags.name: show_qr
flags.description: Gate a QR card on the storefront (no UI element yet; mirrors the local demo's flag for parity)
